prompt: Outfit: cute Y2K casual street outfit with an oversized off-white cotton fleece hoodie worn in a mini-length silhouette, front pouch pocket, relaxed long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and a generalized chest graphic print, layered with a light-blue washed denim-like quilted puffer vest featuring an all-over generalized monogram-style pattern, high padded collar, open front, believable padding volume, subtle yellow lining accent, visible seams, real folds, natural seam tension, realistic drape, clean stitching, premium fabric texture, and refined edge finishing; a very short beige to light-brown mini bottom subtly visible beneath the hoodie hem; white chunky platform lace-up sneaker boots with faux-fur ankle trim, thick rubber sole, metal eyelets, small generalized patch-like side details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, not costume-like, not cheap-looking; add a random mix of delicate casual Y2K silver-tone and white-tone accessories that match the outfit without fixing exact pieces.
